title: Sam Neill dies, Trump IRS deal voided, Graham sworn in: Week in review
shortDescription: Recapping some of the most talked-about news this week from the nation and around the world – in case you missed it.

title: Trump's effort to get state voter info hits a brick wall in courts
shortDescription: Fifteen federal judges unanimously rejected Justice Department demands for state voter lists in a nationwide battle over election integrity.

title: Trump, family look forward to attending FIFA championship
shortDescription: Trump described at a FIFA World Cup reception how his family likes soccer and looks forward to attending the championship game July 19.

title: 'Unacceptable!' Trump threatens Canada with tariffs over wildfire smoke
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is threatening to charge tariffs to Canada over record levels of hazardous air drifting into the U.S. from hundreds of wildfires burning in the north.

title: Trump says he 'brought' World Cup, Olympics
shortDescription: President Donald Trump claimed that the reason why the United States hosted the World Cup and the Olympics is because he "brought them here."

title: Trump says China seized 220 million voter files. What the documents say
shortDescription: The president said China 'fought like hell not to have a Donald Trump win.' A USA TODAY review of declassified records tells a different story.

title: Feds threaten state election officials with funding cuts, prosecution
shortDescription: Experts are questioning Trump's claim that 250,000 noncitizens are registered to vote, citing flawed methodology.

title: Trump asks Lindsey Graham's sister to run for GOP Senate seat in SC
shortDescription: South Carolina Gov. Henry McMaster appointed Darline Graham as the first woman to represent South Carolina in the U.S. Senate on July 13.

title: Amy Schumer trolls viral Chuck Schumer Senate floor fart controversy
shortDescription: Amy Schumer tried to absolve her second cousin once removed, Sen. Chuck Schumer, who was accused of passing gas on the Senate floor earlier this week.

title: Can FCC pull licenses for not airing Trump speech?
shortDescription: President Donald Trump called for ABC and NBC’s licenses to be revoked over not airing his July 16 primetime address focused on election security.

title: Can FCC pull TV licenses for not airing Trump speech? What experts say
shortDescription: President Donald Trump called for ABC and NBC’s licenses to be revoked over not airing his July 16 primetime address focused on election security.

title: Mullin warns states on election security
shortDescription: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin urged states to secure elections as critics debate fraud and Iran's alleged interference.

title: Abbott taps Robert Howden as Texas secretary of state before midterms
shortDescription: Gov. Greg Abbott appointed Robert Howden as the new Texas secretary of state to replace outgoing Jane Nelson. Here's what we know.

title: Texas Democrats wans state to see whether Paxton violated election law
shortDescription: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton's campaign is pushing back against Texas Democrats' complaint alleging that he violated state election laws.

title: Trump administration to appeal trans troop ruling to Supreme Court
shortDescription: The Trump administration wants to pause a ruling that it can't remove some transgender members of the military for now.

title: Reactions to Trump's election integrity speech toe party lines
shortDescription: Despie declassifying documents and providing no evidence prior U.S. election returns had been jeopardized, reactions to Trump's speech were naturally divisive.

title: China, Russia react to Trump speech
shortDescription: Both China and Russia denied President Donald Trump’s allegations of election interference in 2020.

title: Dem leaders react to Trump speech
shortDescription: Democratic leaders react to President Donald Trump's speech that exacerbated U.S. election fraud allegations and China's alleged involvement.

title: Trump revives 2020 fraud allegations as experts challenge his evidence
shortDescription: President Donald Trump made many allegations in his address on election integrity. Experts, former U.S. intelligence officials are skeptical.

title: 'Good Trouble' rallies return to protest Trump policies
shortDescription: Protesters are gathering nationwide for 'Good Trouble Lives On' rallies to advocate for civil and voting rights.

title: As Trump warns of election threats, independent agencies have been cut
shortDescription: Trump has reduced federal agencies that support election security, leaving states to defend their own systems.
